message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Index" as Index
participant "User Controller" as UserController
participant "Database" as Database

User -> Index : GET: /users/signup

Index -> UserController : renderSignup()
UserController -> Index : render(index)
Index -> UserController : display signup

UserController -> Index : async signup()
Index -> UserController : User.findOne(email)

alt [user not found]
UserController -> Database : User.findOne(email)
Database -> UserController : return false
alt [accept]
UserController -> Index : display home
alt [refuse]
UserController -> Index : display home
alt [user already exist]
UserController -> Index : show error
end
end
end
@enduml
